    Summary

    This isn't the first time Honoroit's been mistaken for the lord instead of the servant.

    It is the first time it's gotten him kidnapped.

  2. The World on His Wrist by bendingsignpost

    Fandoms: Sherlock (TV)  
    • Teen And Up Audiences
    • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
    • F/M, M/M
    • Complete Work

    06 Feb 2012

    Tags
    • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
    • Sarah Sawyer/John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes/John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes
    • John Watson
    • Jim Moriarty
    • Sherlock Holmes (again)
    • Sarah Sawyer
    • Alternate Reality
    • reality play
    • partial major character death
    • Angst
    • John Watson Is A BAMF
    • watches 'verse
    Summary

    First, he is shot in Afghanistan. Second, he wakes to a phone call in Chelmsford, Essex. Third is pain, fourth is normalcy, fifth is agony and sixth is confusion. By the eighth, he's lost track. (John-centric AU)

    Series
    • Part 1 of Watches 'Verse
